Class Package

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.abstraction.Package
All Implemented Interfaces:
ClassTypeContainer, ProgramModelElement, ModelElement, NamedModelElement
public class Package extends Object implements ClassTypeContainer
A program model element representing packages.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Package(String name)
    Creates a new package with the given name, organized by the given program model info.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ClassTypeContainer
    getContainer()
    Returns the enclosing package or class type, or method.
    String
    getFullName()
    Returns the name of this package.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the name of this package.
    Package
    getPackage()
    Returns the enclosing package.

  • Constructor Details

    • Package

      public Package(String name)
      Creates a new package with the given name, organized by the given program model info.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the package.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of this package.

      Returns:
      the name of this package.

    • getFullName

      public String getFullName()
      Returns the name of this package.

      getFullName in interface ProgramModelElement

    • getContainer

      public ClassTypeContainer getContainer()
      Returns the enclosing package or class type, or method.

    • getPackage

      public Package getPackage()
      Returns the enclosing package.
